signals.headline: Two-week ceasefire between US and Iran remains in effect | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Two-week ceasefire between US and Iran remains in effect | YES | HIGH confidence**

A two-week ceasefire was announced on April 8, 2026, following nearly 40 days of intense hostilities across the Middle East.[2] However, this ceasefire is described as "fragile" with tensions threatening to reignite, particularly regarding critical shipping routes like the Strait of Hormuz.[1]

signals.headline: Israel-Lebanon high-level talks set to begin | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel-Lebanon high-level talks set to begin | YES | MEDIUM confidence**

Rare direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon representatives are scheduled to commence, marking the first ever high-level contact between the two sides.[1] This occurs amid U.S. pressure on Israel to scale back military strikes and agree to confidence-building measures.[1]
